body:

---
Peter -- Team Stewart had a huge week! We released a new ad, did a radio interview on WMAL with Larry O'Connor, made thousands of calls to voters, and made two more stops on our **Make Fairfax Safe Tour** to rid the county of MS-13! See our weekly update and ways you can help below. **WEEKLY VOLUNTEER CONFERENCE CALL**
You're invited to join a conference call with Team Corey every Tuesday night at 8 pm EST. Dial (515) 739-6200 Access code 896695
* * *
**WE NEED YOUR HELP MAKING CALLS!**
We are so close to our goal! If everyone reading this email can call 500 people or spend 5 hours on the phones for Corey before the end of May, we will reach our goal of 100,000 calls. To sign up, go to [**www.coreystewart.com/phone**](http://www.coreystewart.com/phone?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_15&n=2) or contact your local field representative. _If you're already making calls, please start calling Hanover!_
* * *
**_"Corey Stewart is hard-charging populist conservative. Tough on immigration, great on trade - he's not going to mince words, he's not going to pussyfoot around the issues....That's the right way to defeat Tim Kaine. I am totally helping him, this will be fun."

_** – Laura Ingraham
* * *
**VOLUNTEERS OF THE WEEK**
Congratulations to this week's volunteers of the week, **Michael Herzberg** and **Jonathan Erickson**! Michael has been one of our most valuable team members putting up signs and representing Corey all over the 1st and 7th District. Jonathan continues to lead #TeamCorey on the phones calling thousands of Virginians for Corey every week. Thanks, guys!
* * *
**WOULD YOU LIKE TO HOST COREY?**
If you are interested in hosting a Meet & Greet or Fundraiser for Corey, please contact Heather Mitchell (540) 645-1767 to get one set up today!
[](coreystewart.com/eventcalendar)
* * *
**IN THE NEWS** \--- **Stewart Releases New Ad "Winner" Highlighting His Winning Record While Leading As A Conservative** Entitled "Winner", the ad spotlights Corey Stewart's record of winning in blue Northern Virginia while leading as a conservative cutting taxes, leading the nation's toughest illegal alien crackdown, and being the first in Virginia to protect kids by putting retired cops in schools.

You can watch the video version [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FCoreyStewartVA%2Fvideos%2F2211081398908688%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_15&n=3), or click on the image below.
[](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FCoreyStewartVA%2Fvideos%2F2211081398908688%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_15&n=4) **Friday, Corey joined The Larry O'Connor Show on[WMAL DC](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FWMALDC%2F%3Ffref%3Dmentions&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_15&n=5) to discuss the issues in the Virginia US Senate Race. They** talked about everything from how he will BEAT Tim Kaine this November, to illegal immigration and DACA, and why the Republican Party should support President [Donald J. Trump! ](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FDonaldTrump%2F%3Ffref%3Dmentions&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_15&n=6)**Check it out[here!](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FCoreyStewartVA%2Fvideos%2F2210197798997048%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_15&n=7)** **Under Corey's Leadership, Prince William will be the first county in Virginia to put retired police officers in our schools!** Check it out by clicking [here. ](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwtop.com%2Fprince-william-county%2F2018%2F04%2Fprince-william-co-looks-hire-retired-police-officers-grade-schools%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_15&n=8) **Un der Stewart's leadership, FitchRatings has reaffirmed Prince William County's triple-AAA bond rating, a rating earned by less than 2% of counties nationwide. All three bond-agencies. _
_**_Check out Stewart's record as a fiscal conservative[here.](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpwcchairman%2Fphotos%2Fa.1600263473420522.1073741832.1596958217084381%2F1614449925335210%2F%3Ftype%3D3%26theater%26ifg%3D1&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_15&n=9) _
* * *
**What Corey will fight for in the Senate:**
* _Build the Wall_
* _Cut Taxes and Simplify the Tax Code_
* _Repeal Obamacare and Lower Your Premiums_

name: The White House
subject: Senate Intelligence Committee backs Gina Haspel
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=120225dcadd697dc3bfb39627c2bd197c8a4bcd05916a099c3198353415fc3d9eb5c354b927f67fa3df8d5c99d2060b11797bb88ed5562d4) The White House • May 16, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump hosts a roundtable with mayors and others affected by California’s dangerous sanctuary city policies.
---|---
• | President Trump welcomes Shavkat Mirziyoyev, President of the Republic of Uzbekistan, to the White House.
## Senate Intelligence Committee backs Gina Haspel
**Acting CIA Director Gina Haspel got another boost this morning,** with the Senate Intelligence Committee voting to recommend her confirmation as CIA Director to the full Senate. Two Democrats joined with Republicans in backing Haspel, including Sen. Mark Warner (D-VA)—the top Democrat on the committee.
**“Gina is committed to making sure we never have to relearn lessons of the past** ,” Director of National Intelligence Dan Coats writes in an [op-ed for _USA Today_](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=120225dcadd697dc449cdb225d464e76f2c724fd78d6f0923a0a1737b0b87bac38aa135ec04047b2d54f0913646e1ac9bcc1f99fa9a99531). “Instability and uncertainty create devastating consequences in war zones . . . We need to ensure that we have in place the most capable, experienced and measured intelligence leaders to address these serious challenges.”
**Gina Haspel fits the bill**. The _Chicago Tribune’s_ editorial board explained last week that President Trump’s CIA nominee “gets rave reviews from former national security officials from Democratic and Republican administrations, and is said to be strongly supported by agency employees.” If confirmed, she will be the CIA’s first female Director.
[Gina Haspel’s confirmation is central to our national security. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=120225dcadd697dc162e5c5525eb3ad58b5c2ec730bdbd4220b7040f888d9c31ca328eb000b5bc661852684941fcd9601638310c3fb7001e)
**Learn more** : [Why Haspel is one of the most accomplished CIA officers “of her generation”](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=120225dcadd697dc9614bb0f04f36918d0fb3c6c85c2ce514816f21a464f0e50ddabd71f78dc1b280cc62d65b5c48384ebadc593c166c6f0)

---
|

## President Trump on sanctuary cities: ‘We’ve had it’
**President Trump addressed the families of fallen police officers yesterday**. “We stand with our police and we stand with you 100 percent,” the President said. “Their immortal legacy lives on in each and every one of you.”
**The story of one slain officer sends our country a message**. “Agent Martinez took immense pride and joy in serving his country as a Border Patrol agent,” President Trump said. “He bravely confronted the cartels, the smugglers, the human traffickers, the gangs that threaten our communities. One night, last November, Agent Martinez died in the line of duty. It was horrific.”
**“The first duty of government is to protect our citizens,”** the President said as he called on Congress to fix America’s broken immigration system. “Stop sanctuary cities, and shut down policies that release violent criminals back into our communities. We don’t want it any longer. We’ve had it.”
**President Trump will host a group of mayors and others** directly affected by California’s dangerous sanctuary city laws at the White House today.
[See highlights from President Trump’s speech on fallen law enforcement officers.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=120225dcadd697dc9737224f8051715a54993e2a24e1f43f310746b67bda1d4ee409bb398dffc222f33decbb774c663cab60a3191b946bc4)
**More** : [How sanctuary cities endanger law enforcement—and our communities](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=120225dcadd697dc650814da8ec802b4585aa01dad3e290a819ba924b206c72b1882a19604bfc974ca9a57d45356b14fadded8f58d9ad5a2)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump and Vice President Mike Pence participate in the 37th Annual Peace Officers’ Memorial** | May 15, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=120225dcadd697dc0dbebb66bd52293eff669592c0386e440d37c7d79631118dc562852ca8d417da23ff074c5eed5393fd444517f1b62016) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=120225dcadd697dca20f59fd9ce5b4d386c3a489f662c6d7f4bfd05b5f44ff6ae6e3318b76328a35527ecd832f5bd65c5185c7bb91b8e012) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4ce62f525055e00f790509bc23f6502bba2a9bd72901c8d58953e4bb92e3a331ad48419d0835d9cd3fdd5b402e143041192098f1083fe798b)
---

subject: The strictest abortion ban in the country
body:
Dear Activist,

Just a few days ago, the Iowa state legislature passed the nation's strictest abortion law -- banning abortion after only six weeks, before some women know they are even pregnant.

This comes just two months after Republican attempted to pass legislation banning abortion after 20 weeks in the House and after the Trump Administration introduced shocking new rules that allow health care workers to discriminate against women seeking an abortion.

**Here 's the truth: I am sick and tired of Republican politicians playing politics with our health care and going out of their way to target women and our rights in the process. That's why I'm asking:**

[**Sign my petition my urgent petition condemning the Iowa state legislature for passing the nation 's most restrictive abortion law and call on all Republican politicians to stop attacking women's health and reproductive rights. The only way to win this fight is to make our voices heard.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d0nk7/6/tn/r5cs/61tu1k/vPwchR7sgO/P/P) ****[Add Your Name](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d0nk7/s/tn/r5cs/61tu1k/z2v7pJbMsk/P/P)**** I've spent my career in office fighting those who want to roll back decades' worth of progress on women's health and reproductive freedom.

Together we fought to require employers to provide employees with no-cost coverage for contraception and 55 million American women benefitted.

Together we advanced legislation in my state of California to ensure that so-called crisis pregnancy centers provide women with accurate information about the full range of reproductive services available to them.

Together we defeated every attempt by Republicans to defund Planned Parenthood since Trump's election, and we're never going to stop fighting to make sure those doors stay open, and women get the care they need.

**And together we are going to fight back on the national and state level to ensure legislation like this six-week abortion ban is defeated -- be it in the courts, at the ballot, or in our legislatures.**

[**Sign my urgent petition right now to tell Republican politicians to stop attacking our reproductive rights.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d0nk7/v/tn/r5cs/61tu1k/UPLyJGX7n6/P/P) ****[Add Your Name](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d0nk7/z/tn/r5cs/61tu1k/6tVz8gsfbF/P/P)**** We can't go backward. Now is the time we must fight to defend and expand on the progress made for women's rights and reproductive health.

Thanks for all you do,

Kamala Harris
U.S. Senator, California

name: Tom Perez
subject: If we lose Tammy's seat, we won't win the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Tammy's preparing for a big fight. Wisconsin went for Donald Trump in 2016, and you better believe Republicans took that as a sign that her seat is up for grabs.
---
Tammy Baldwin is facing a tough re-election for Senate in Wisconsin -- and if we want Democrats to have any chance of flipping the Senate in November, she needs our help right now.

Tammy's preparing for a big fight. Wisconsin went for Donald Trump in 2016, and you better believe Republicans took that as a sign that her seat is up for grabs. This is the state of Scott Walker and Paul Ryan -- that's why it's so important that we come together now to help defend it.

**Split a $10 donation between Tammy Baldwin's campaign and the DNC to help re-elect Tammy to the Senate and elect Democrats up and down the ballot.**

**[ DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f7b/4067b0a/59279ee32/7e47504a/2874083327/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-tammy?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180516_tp_nd&source=em_20180516_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180516_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f7b/4067b0a/59279ee32/7e47504b/2874083327/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-tammy?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180516_tp_nd&source=em_20180516_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180516_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f7b/4067b0a/59279ee32/7e475048/2874083327/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-tammy?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180516_tp_nd&source=em_20180516_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180516_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f7b/4067b0a/59279ee32/7e475049/2874083327/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-tammy?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180516_tp_nd&source=em_20180516_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180516_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $200](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f7b/4067b0a/59279ee32/7e475056/2874083327/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-tammy?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20180516_tp_nd&source=em_20180516_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180516_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f7b/4067b0a/59279ee32/7e475057/2874083327/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-tammy?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180516_tp_nd&source=em_20180516_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180516_tp_nd")
** I can't tell you how much of a rock star Tammy is, Derek. When she won her campaign in 2012, she became the first woman to represent Wisconsin in the Senate and the first openly gay senator in American history. And that was just the start.

She's been fighting for working families in the Senate -- protecting every American's right to affordable health care and standing up against the GOP's repeated attacks on the middle class. She's the sort of senator that we need way, way more of in D.C. -- so we need to put our support behind her this year.

**[Will you join me in supporting Tammy? Split a $10 donation between her campaign and the DNC right now to elect Democrats nationwide this year.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f7b/4067b0a/59279ee32/7e475054/2874083327/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-tammy?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Will+you+join+me+in+supporting+Tammy+Spl&utm_campaign=em_20180516_tp_nd&source=em_20180516_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180516_tp_nd")**

Thanks for standing with Tammy.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- Right now, Tammy is one of the only Democratic statewide elected officials in Wisconsin -- so you know how badly Paul Ryan and Scott Walker want to take her seat this November. **[We can't let them -- support Tammy's campaign with a $10 donation today.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f7b/4067b0a/59279ee32/7e475055/2874083327/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-tammy?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+We+cant+let+them++support+Tammys+campaig&utm_campaign=em_20180516_tp_nd&source=em_20180516_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180516_tp_nd")**

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Grassroots Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Hi there,

**It 's All About West Virginia.**

It's been a busy month for Team Manchin. Let's start this update with a note from Joe:

"Thank you to all of the West Virginians who voted in the primary, and to all the candidates who put their name on the ballot. I congratulate Paula Jean Swearingen, for running a spirited primary campaign and for caring about our great state so much. Together, Democrats turned out in big numbers to make their voices heard for common sense. I'm humbled to have received more votes than all three top Republican candidates combined, and I look forward to carrying this momentum to victory in November." \- Joe

We had a huge turnout at our Primary Night Victory Party. Thank you to everyone who attended!

Take a minute to watch some of the highlights from Joe's victory speech. [WATCH HERE.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftmnX79j%2fDYR3vRUL6zhyDnFUtOxdzHl7E3BlHaQxbihsXdTPu3%2f6DGX5msWJhmenYyboYHaVEnHAVTPVfh47%2bcyJH0kTsJj3ok%3d)

Our First TV Ad

We already launched Joe's fist TV ad of 2018. [Click here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfgjng3peY%2b6qNhN6pm5ecS%2bwVcdzlcOEf%2bFhgCbYF5AYlA70%2be%2fdXdM6q6iTdTmraPLyqMCT917W%2b9yyZWU2MWCdpm7gfLtZgwdZkGjNDX1Q%3d) to watch "Never Change" and make sure to share it with your friends on social media.

#IKnowJoe

Did you catch the latest episode of our #IKnowJoe web series? A college student shares why he is proud to support Joe and his work in Washington to get things done. WATCH [HERE.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftmnX79j%2fDYR3sek8xq7IwnsDcID2oLteeVQ0UXIPuc0gLIK32LlhRew7RYX4uHNcxA09HunyFL9aMJvuGRzcBoHcI%2bMaBa2czQ%3d)

Follow #IKnowJoe on social media to keep up with our campaign's web series.

Endorsement Update

Because of Senator Manchin's work to bring all sides to the table to move West Virginia forward, he has strong support from both the business community and organized labor

You can check out the full list of Joe endorsements [here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAunrz5qy4CWiMoa8j0A0%2f59c888a2LSerxYX7hl8XprnxFldMBtPhVVWvXEXqDplpnodxO6r2ON3FF48sCGXerU), and check back in as more endorsements get announced.

Joe's been endorsed by the West Virginia AFL-CIO, the West Virginia Hospitality & Travel Association, the United Mine Workers, Political Action Committee for the Huntington Regional Chamber of Commerce, and the Plumbers and Pipefitters.Check out the video from the UMWA endorsement [here.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftkr3Z8rwVuTcQhwBzGI%2brzWJcUJOl3be9XIW4dGkgobpkg8A4DS9pOsgYvOPQe2JnrZ710ZFQJ83V7YHti2%2fcl2DMLbb1wotHU%3d)

In the News
In case you missed it, **[the Charleston Gazette-Mail ran an editorial praising Joe's commitment to bipartisanship.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON1nrE8P441a634V1QhzY1y7PrWfnXSL1DKUGrGaV6Vm2DSvb8YkSg6QwId5gh2FTkVR29jKKL0LeooTNSMDdiWk1lfZNhKcj6y42hbOPPwoRbZ4tSoSTxHmt9imQFQuynY1ssn5MCyAAB9TAPFwIo70UeMq1nOnRsCOOn3Dnx%2bOkyMOCQ7wR2YSgzUWK%2fTqljX1hcbWd5SgTzSsULVtUP8ZJ%2bYfBuFq28Vqh9fevMa8AnzctuC1jajsGIj%2fQ78exuBYU9TDD1YvM6df755%2fvkae34IH7xI4bfHLbELnp5GVYk%3d)**
Sen. Manchin has shown repeatedly his willingness, even his eagerness, to work with anyone of any party for what he believes is good for West Virginians. He listens, but never flinches, from criticism, from friends or foes alike. It is one of his great strengths.

Joe Making a Difference

Because of Joe's efforts, the New River Train will continue running.

**[From the Associated Press:](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC47U%2fpIZwXN5zHTMMb%2bvPkNKJwyaojrlX%2baEglfN%2fSFw%2b37ryvkepGKlflNprRJLGru8XRqsYCxUGzQ0y%2bbKmlPckyzj7nbhoCXTsvoXzLDsK6fO%2b2faf%2b6zm%2bnjoI5f4Gq43jMccT9np1iFbUbBLKWEEg565H8oPsDZvd%2b2iPOg4wDHne9vd62tLPTw4hUX5u1NFxqSSMuVOa4pZKVrlQCueb1w1YOHP0rtx%2fL0F%2bXVFvaUQ42fr158%3d)** An agreement with Amtrak officials will keep West Virginia's New River Train service going...U.S. Sen. Joe Manchin, D-West Virginia, announced Wednesday that Amtrak and the Collis P. Huntington Society reached a general agreement on pricing.

Thank you for standing with Joe and supporting our campaign every step of the way.

Best,
Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager, Manchin for WV

[ P.S. Check out this letter to the editor from a UMWA member supporting Joe.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKWzMJcOdTGW4vdFuTXcd9P0kUJG1H%2fOraPrid2HjWuY%2fS1HaGPdXw%2fatGchI7bc%2biFGDKWUx5OsHBTy2dTy7BVZdRid3pJ2FVlqJlj2kIalPN72xDVqEmG4S%2bMrNxdBK3OTNxuEQ6icFi%2flQpT7N5tIevZSjc17Q72u8VLpnsd4FMFE03yjJ33dQKIsr9Hkn3j7Qfv59XN6Sn0iUSbvtThsolxpZdW%2bpmd8xbKPLlJMgYDTd07Xi9t4%3d)

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
---

Charleston, WV 25361

name: Bob Casey
subject: thank you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e67bc/51dbcc2a/1efb174/3a248c9/1681282044/VEsH/ "http://www.bobcasey.com/")

Hi team,

I just wanted to take a moment to say _thank you_.

Thank you for taking time out of your day yesterday to cast your ballot for me and other Democrats up and down the ticket. Thank you for driving your friends and family to the polls. Thank you for making calls to turn out the vote on behalf of Democrats across the Commonwealth.

This election is important, I don't need to tell you that, and the work is only just beginning. If we want to make sure PA goes blue in November, I'm going to need your help.

This race will only get tougher. The GOP is already coming after me, and I expect that they'll double-down now that the general election is in full swing. After winning statewide in 2016, Republicans want nothing more than to see PA go red again in 2018 -- we need to do everything we can to make sure that doesn't happen.

With that in mind, will you make a $5 investment in Pennsylvania today? It has never been more important to make sure that this campaign is ready fight back against Republican attacks and to spread our message to every corner of the Commonwealth.

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e67bc/51dbcc2a/1efb174/3a248ca/1681282044/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDUxNl9mcl9uZF9QQSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180516_fr_nd_PA&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thank you for being part of our team. We can win in November if we work together.

Bob

name: Mary Barzee Flores
subject: I am running for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/KCGJLY2XtHiAvcBVLEB5te7UKR2SteUXBJQIqJk53mw=/wOKGJ0x0uMeHNtO-SkMsMZ35GHSDqRcq_-gHpmUJDmI=?refcode=May-16-WN-introduction_other)

Friend,
I began my campaign for Congress last year for the same reasons that an unprecedented number of Democrats have stepped up to run in 2018:
The danger posed to our democracy, our community, and our families, by the Trump presidency and the Republican Congress was simply too great for me to sit idle and do nothing. It was - and remains - a moral imperative to me.
**And that is ultimately the reason that I have decided to challenge Rep. Mario Diaz-Balart in Florida 's 25th district.**
I'm just as confident that Mario Diaz-Balart can, should, and _will_ be beat this fall.
**And I 'm going to beat him in the 25th district.**
It's been just over one year since Mario Diaz-Balart cast his vote for the Trump-Ryan healthcare bill that would have gutted Obamacare and forced millions of Americans to lose their healthcare.
_**This is my promise to you:**_
* I am going to spend every single day between now and Election Day reminding the voters of District 25 that Mario Diaz-Balart voted - _not just a year ago, but repeatedly_ \- to rip healthcare coverage from hardworking Americans;
* That he has consistently voted for the NRA, earning an "A" rating and taking in more campaign cash than any other Congressman in Florida in the last two decades;
* That _again and again_ , he has voted for special interests and tax cuts for billionaires and big corporations, and against average, hardworking families;
* That he denies science while the seas are rising and putting South Florida in dire peril;
* That despite hollow promises and lip service to DREAMers, he's been a rubber stamp for the Trump administration while they act to tear apart immigrant families.

This November, Mario Diaz-Balart will not get a free pass. He will finally have to answer for his record. And he will lose.
I'm ready for this fight. Will you join me?
[**Please support my candidacy for Florida 's District 25 by contributing to our campaign. This seat _will_ turn blue.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KCGJLY2XtHiAvcBVLEB5te7UKR2SteUXBJQIqJk53mw=/wOKGJ0x0uMeHNtO-SkMsMZ35GHSDqRcq_-gHpmUJDmI=?refcode=May-16-WN-introduction_other)
-**Mary**

Hello --

Last night's Republican primary results show us exactly why it's so important to re-elect Governor Tom Wolf.

For over 35 years, Scott Wagner has been doing business in Harrisburg and abusing a broken system to enrich himself, to reward his friends, and to further his own political ambitions. He is unhinged from the reality of everyday Pennsylvanians and he represents the very worst of Harrisburg.

Now, Scott Wagner is the Republican nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania.

We've released a new video to make sure Pennsylvanians know why Wagner would be so dangerous for our commonwealth. **[Watch the video now -- then chip in to help Tom Wolf make sure Scott Wagner never becomes our governor.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd3e/73a2bc12/3d4aea7c/1fcd68d2/1862557942/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-wagner-video?gpsid=14_50_574&refcode=em18_180516_WagVid_fnd_gq_act__js&utm_campaign=em18_180516_WagVid_fnd_gq_act__js&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&utm_content=4+-+Watch+the+video+now++then+chip+in+to+hel")**
[](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd3e/73a2bc12/3d4aea7c/1fcd68d1/1862557942/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-wagner-video?gpsid=14_50_574&refcode=em18_180516_WagVid_fnd_gq_act__js&utm_campaign=em18_180516_WagVid_fnd_gq_act__js&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&utm_content=5")
---
Instead of working across the aisle to find common ground to get things done, Wagner has used violent language to intimidate his opponents. He told a local radio host he'd "be sitting in the back room with a baseball bat" to intimidate lawmakers and told a group of supporters that things in Harrisburg "are gonna get a little bloody."

It's not just the language Wagner uses that is dangerous for our commonwealth, but also his record, policies, and ideas that show how he always fights for himself and for special interests, not everyday Pennsylvanians:
* Wagner opposes a shale tax and is the leading force in Harrisburg for letting oil and gas companies get away without paying their fair share.
* Wagner supports allowing some companies to avoid paying taxes.
* Wagner sides with big insurance companies while supporting health care cuts.
* Wagner supported a slash and burn budget that would have cut long-term care for seniors and assistance for people with disabilities.

**[Watch the video to learn why Scott Wagner would be such a dangerous choice for Pennsylvania -- then chip in to make sure Tom Wolf can continue fighting for all of us.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd3e/73a2bc12/3d4aea7c/1fcd68d0/1862557942/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-wagner-video?gpsid=14_50_574&refcode=em18_180516_WagVid_fnd_gq_act__js&utm_campaign=em18_180516_WagVid_fnd_gq_act__js&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&utm_content=6+-+Watch+the+video+to+learn+why+Scott+Wagne")**

Jeff Sheridan

subject: I'll be brief, Peter

body:
I want to thank you for everything you've done so far. |
---

| | Peter, we're at a turning point in this race. Mitch McConnell, the Washington special interests -- they all have a candidate to line up behind now and try to beat me. If that wasn't enough, he's one who was willing to prime the pump of special interest funding by spending millions of dollars of his own.

But while we're at a turning point, that's certainly not an ending point -- far from it. In 2012, we beat the cynics by going door to door in every Indiana community with a positive vision for how to move our country forward. We can do it again this year. No matter how much they spend to try and take me down, I won't stop working to stand up for Hoosiers.

But we have to stay on track, and to do that we have to hit our mid-month goal. Kelly tells me we're still 137 supporters short.

Conservatives can’t expect to win in November if we can’t support each other now.

What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6b6f07fc8a3e4baf847fd9eb2da35671&_e=btDTa1jpPBHyckjhp_pJPFPF7gXNKCp_1Rldm-i2aSpkv-GmaDfOqsmbl-k5YDLUt3oV1jHwkJkAAVbowSwKmgLGzDJaKtoizKHJqjAOQ2Fx6c0tpzgrJasI8lWfQAD595-MiHFnnJ9FnZRVuVGkGwC4RInEpHOwc3U0v-RoocjlFUvnxIeshMG0ixg1BPnwvzETJMlQf5V1tlg-quMGaN1Pz95tWDKd0wPU5jEzsa741wIHHdUsF9s8M_Na-yCJVRz470nynt1j9V3WoZZebieTzltpfGjc092qBwK1ijLtu8IoRBWPZGRRby2iWctC6oXth-qkFjDRrSPoBIoOBI3jasHkMm6N_t85MbIc3k70F3588n5mLFJmhOW1ZLqE) that you care about? clean_body: I’m trying to reach as many conservatives as possible to make sure we’re all on the same page. Politicians like Tammy Baldwin know how to manipulate.. Friend, did you get my note the other day? I’m trying to reach as many conservatives as possible to make sure we’re all on the same page. Politicians like Tammy Baldwin know how to manipulate voters. They know how to distort our vision. And they know how to win! If we aren’t focusing all of our time defeating her, we might as well be handing her another victory. Now, that is NOT what I want. I’m hoping you’ll sign my petition to encourage all Republicans to come together now: It should only take a second, but it will send a big message. Thanks, Friend. Leah \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, today marks a turning point in our campaign, the day we shift our eyes from the primary, and onto the general. Together, we won the Republican endorsement for United States Senate at convention. And we owe it all to the dedication and support of hundreds of grassroots supporters, like you. So first, let me say, thank you. Now, this victory is a cause for celebration, but times like these can create tension between other members of our party. And friend, that makes us ALL weaker. Conservatives can’t expect to win in November if we can’t support each other now. We need to look straight ahead, towards the general election and focus on a November victory. Believe me, dissension is what Tammy Baldwin and the liberal establishment will be doing – along with collecting millions from their mega donors. If Republicans are fighting with each other, rather than focusing on defeating Baldwin, our resources will be split, our message will be distorted, and friend, we might not be able to make it out of that mess. If we want conservative victories and if we want to put America First and change Washington, we have to come together and defeat obstructionists like Tammy Baldwin. That means unifying now. The stakes are just too high to let anything come in the way of defeating Tammy Baldwin. Thank you, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Todd Prieb - Scholten4Iowa
subject: Ugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Ugh.
If you’re like me, right about now you’re getting countless emails from countless politicians talking about how the sky is going to fall if you don’t donate to their campaigns.
It’s impossible to give to every person who asks, so how do you prioritize where to donate your hard-earned money if you want to help Democrats get elected?
I tend to look at which races can make the biggest impact—which is also a big part of why I’m working on this campaign. **No race in the entire country would make a bigger statement than ousting Steve King.** And J.D. Scholten is the single candidate that has the work ethic, the support across the district, and the campaign structure to get it done.
Campaigns are often judged by their fundraising reports, and we have a critical one coming out next week—the final FEC reporting deadline before voters go to the polls on June 5th. This report only counts contributions made before midnight tonight, so **today is the last day to contribute to this campaign and have your support show up before the primary. **
We’ve significantly outraised Steve King two quarters in a row, and doing it a third time would have a major impact on what happens in November. Many of you have already donated to J.D. (_6,015 of you to be exact_), and we can’t thank you enough. We’re doing what it takes to win, but we absolutely can’t let up now. If you’ve already given, please consider donating again, and if you haven’t, there’s no better time than right now. [**_Click here to contribute a gift of any size!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1225862/6765183/1870146729?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDVhNjFhZi00ZjU5LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRhNzgwMTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlfUiTAobEefxqSbYQsIEl4yAA46dQ_4mftFtOr1lHA=)
As J.D. has said, **_he_** can’t beat Steve King, but together, _**we**_ can.
On November 6th, when all the national news is about the shocking upset of Steve King in Iowa—know that your early contributions are what helped to make that happen.
Thank you for being a part of this incredible movement,
Todd Prieb
Political Director
Scholten4Iowa

name: Dana Bye
subject: Local and National Experts are saying the same thing...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

Today, Inside Elections announced that it's upgrading our chances of flipping the 7th Congressional District this fall! The non-partisan political ratings group follows similar upgrades in recent months by the Cook Political Report, CNN, and Larry Sabato's Crystal Ball.

And it's not just national reporters commenting on this political shift. This morning Abigail spoke at the Chesterfield Chamber of Commerce's meeting before the keynote speaker, longtime Virginia political analyst Dr. Bob Holsworth, took the floor. In his remarks, Mr. Holsworth told the Chamber breakfast attendees that **" many of the national commentators, the more they look at this district, think that it is changing, and that the changes can make this [VA07] a very competitive district."**

Mr. Holsworth was previously quoted in the Chesterfield Observer saying this of our campaign, "My belief is that the tone of the country and the tone of the region has changed, and that gives a particular kind of Democrat an opportunity. Spanberger is that type of Democrat."

The fact is we're entering a new era of politics in the 7th. The game has changed, and everything from polling results to the enthusiastic turnouts at our events is telling us that Abigail is the one who's changing it. Now is the time to throw things into high gear.

We need to raise another $15,000 before submitting our final pre-primary numbers to the FEC next week. **[Can you help us reach that goal by contributing $25, $50 or $100 today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/d4IU3cOiqcQMwJkQDdJqlVWUCgCZ0yaW4YPs9GXZNMM=/Mq6iqup0aiJtBCOnJMbAK0TsA6B7GHJyVvCTCUorGNg=?refcode=inside_elections)**

Eyes across the country are turning toward the 7th, and they're seeing Abigail's incredible grassroots campaign front and center. Let's work together to make sure more people are able to see it. [Donate to Team Spanberger today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/d4IU3cOiqcQMwJkQDdJqlVWUCgCZ0yaW4YPs9GXZNMM=/Mq6iqup0aiJtBCOnJMbAK0TsA6B7GHJyVvCTCUorGNg=?refcode=inside_elections)

Sincerely,

\- Dana Bye
_Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Jeff's new book
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
I want to share some exciting news. As I travel across the country
#
Friends,
I want to share some exciting news. As I travel across the country supporting progressive candidates I am continually struck by the grassroots energy I see. Progressives from all walks of life have stepped forward to run for office--and are succeeding. Huge numbers, in state after state, have marched to fight the disastrous Trump agenda. And we have seen in one special election after another a massive erosion in the level of support for Republicans and their reactionary agenda.
The work of Our Revolution has been critical to those efforts. They are providing real support to candidates and activists across the country, and are doing the hard work of organizing in community after community.
Of course, Our Revolution was inspired by the historic 2016 presidential campaign that so many of you were a part of. Jeff Weaver, who managed the 2016 race, now has a new book that tells the inside story of our campaign. Jeff chronicles the highs and lows as we went from single digits in the polls to, against all the odds, winning 22 states and 13 million votes.
**Get your copy today at[Amazon](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab43/bed43eb/6e0b897d/75fdc422/408582796/VEsH/ "https://www.amazon.com/How-Bernie-Won-Revolution-Country/dp/1250144752"), [Barnes and Noble](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab43/bed43eb/6e0b897d/75fdc42d/408582796/VEsE/ "https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/how-bernie-won-jeff-weaver/1127397987;jsessionid=0BE4874E7CDBBCF06868E66B9C40FAAB.prodny_store01-atgap13?ean=9781250144751#/"), or [your local independent bookseller.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab43/bed43eb/6e0b897d/75fdc42c/408582796/VEsF/ "https://indiebound.addlibra.com/store/cart")**
Jeff reveals for the first time how the support for our progressive insurgency grew in every community in the country while the establishment fought us every step of the way.
Jeff not only discusses the campaign itself but also provides a modern political context for that campaign. This is extremely important as we approach the historically important midterm elections, and attempt to build the kind of grassroots movement we need to allow us to create a government that works for all of us, not just the 1%. He even has some great stories of the two of us traveling the highways and backroads of Vermont in the good days!
In closing, these are difficult political times. But, together, I have no doubt that we will move this country forward in making real, lasting and progressive change. All of us are needed in this fight to create a better tomorrow.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

body:
#
This is a huge moment.

Friend,
Last night, our first TV ad went on the air in Baltimore.
It's a pretty incredible representation of who Ben is, what his values are, and what he wants for Maryland. I know I'm incredibly proud that more folks get to see exactly what we stand for and what we're working toward.
With just a few weeks left until the primary, we need to make sure this ad is seen by as many people as possible -- but we need the funds to keep it on the air.
**[Check out our new ad now, then donate $5 or more today to keep it on the air.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a61d/7ab0e2c4/7fb690d0/349a4553/3031035333/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-new-ad?refcode=OHQ05168A")**
[](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a61d/7ab0e2c4/7fb690d0/349a4553/3031035333/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-new-ad?refcode=OHQ05168A")
We know that there are tons of voters who are still undecided about who they're voting for in June -- and in a race like this, every single vote makes a difference.
Ben is the only candidate with the passion and plan to change Maryland for the better: He wants a stronger economy fueled by clean power projects, better pay for our public school teachers, and universal healthcare with a Medicare-for-All system.
We know that the more people who hear about Ben and his platform, the more people will vote for him -- that's why we need to put this ad in front of as many people as possible right now.
**[You can help: Chip in $5 or more right now to support Ben's new TV ad.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a61d/7ab0e2c4/7fb690d0/349a4553/3031035333/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-new-ad?refcode=OHQ05168A")**
Thanks -- more soon,
Travis

name: Team Inslee
subject: Forwards or backwards?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Policies passed in Republican states are a clear step backwards. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796d7/2f5ea88d/7142e454/2cbcd03c/4251207760/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") Friend, **When we have Republican governors at the helm, what do we get? We go backwards.**
1. Restrictive bans on a woman's reproductive rights.
2. Discriminatory adoption policies that hurt LGBTQ families.
3. Gerrymandered legislative districts that disenfranchise minority voters.

Between Republican and Democratic leadership, the contrast couldn't be more stark. | [CHIP IN FOR PROGRESS »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796d7/2f5ea88d/7142e454/2cbcd03c/4251207760/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema")
---
Under Republican governors, states across the nation are restricting the rights of women, LGBTQ communities, and voters. Under progressive governors, the opposite is true. In Washington alone this year, we passed:
1. The _Reproductive Parity Act_ , which requires that health insurers in Washington provide a full range of reproductive health care options, including abortion coverage.
2. A ban on 'conversion therapy' for LGBTQ adolescents.
3. Voter access laws to make our democracy healthier: same-day voter registration, automatic voter registration, and a new _Voting Rights Act_.

**When we have progressives leading our states, what do we get? We see forward progress.**
Governor Inslee has been at the helm, driving progressive legislation for the state of Washington and serving as a model for the nation. And now we need you to show you're part of our team standing for progressive governing.
[**We're coming up to our mid-May deadline -- can you chip in to support all that we're fighting for here in Washington and across the country?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796d7/2f5ea88d/7142e454/2cbcd03c/4251207760/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks,
Team Inslee

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5ab1/24c69fd9/1c03f24ad/188f40d5/802836242/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ39N_digital_email_20180516_STFSlimMargins_inact&source=WQEFEQ39N_digital_email_20180516_STFSlimMargins_inact")
---

Peter,

Seven of our House women are running to replace Republicans who barely kept their seats in 2016.

And FOUR of those women have primary elections coming up on Super Tuesday (June 5th)!

Democrats are poised to take these four seats from ultra-vulnerable Republicans, and we know our pro-choice Democratic women are the best candidates to get the job done.

**[Donate $3 to help put $100,000 in our Super Tuesday Fund so we can help pro-choice Democratic women flip these highly competitive seats.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5ab1/24c69fd9/1c03f24ad/188f40d3/802836242/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180515_email_SuperTuesFund?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+Donate+3+to+help+put+100000+in+our+Super&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ39N_digital_email_20180516_STFSlimMargins_inact&source=WQEFEQ39N_digital_email_20180516_STFSlimMargins_inact")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5ab1/24c69fd9/1c03f24ad/188f40cd/802836242/VEsP/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180515_email_SuperTuesFund?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=9+-++endif+&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ39N_digital_email_20180516_STFSlimMargins_inact&source=WQEFEQ39N_digital_email_20180516_STFSlimMargins_inact")
Abby Finkenauer (IA-01), Katie Hill (CA-25), Sara Jacobs (CA-49), and Virginia Madueño (CA-10) are all running to replace Republicans who won their districts by fewer than 10 points in 2016.

Those slim margins have attracted lots of candidates, creating some very crowded primary elections.

Our support is critical to helping our women break through. In particular, our three California candidates are running in races where it's anyone's game, and Sara is the only Democratic woman in her primary.

With just a few weeks until Super Tuesday, we need to pull out all the stops to make sure our women make it through their primaries.

**Donate $3 to our Super Tuesday Fund so our pro-choice Democratic women can advance to the general and defeat vulnerable Republicans:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-Super-Tuesday-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5ab1/24c69fd9/1c03f24ad/188f40cf/802836242/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180515_email_SuperTuesFund?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=11+-++endif+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitSuperT&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ39N_digital_email_20180516_STFSlimMargins_inact&source=WQEFEQ39N_digital_email_20180516_STFSlimMargins_inact")**

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Re: today's teacher march
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203518/2fde7c66/466c0847/1569c776/2760985644/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-our-teachers?gpsid=8_43_607&source=em18_180516_teache_adv_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180516_teache_adv_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
Friend,

Today, thousands of teachers marched in Raleigh to fight for our students, fight for our schools, and fight for our future.

And I'm with them.

My mom was a public school teacher, and if she were still with us, you better believe she would have been there today.

That's how I was raised -- to respect our public school teachers and to stand up for what I believe.

**[We need to stand up for public education in North Carolina. We need to invest in our future. Add your name here to support our teachers.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203518/2fde7c66/466c0847/1569c709/2760985644/VEsE/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-our-teachers?gpsid=8_43_607&source=em18_180516_teache_adv_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180516_teache_adv_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+stand+up+for+public+education")**

This one shouldn't be difficult.

As parents and grandparents, we leave our kids in the hands of teachers for hours each school day.

We trust them with our children and grandchildren. We trust them to educate and support our kids. We trust them to keep our children safe.

And now we need to put our money where our trust is and raise teacher pay.

**[Add your name if you agree -- our teachers deserve better!](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203518/2fde7c66/466c0847/1569c708/2760985644/VEsF/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-our-teachers?gpsid=8_43_607&source=em18_180516_teache_adv_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180516_teache_adv_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+if+you+agree++our+teachers")**

Thanks for all you continue to do,

Roy

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Amanda Brown Lierman
subject: Please take a couple minutes to read this, Derek:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
By now you've probably heard about the "new DNC" -- and I'd like to make one thing clear: This is more than a branding exercise.
---
Derek --

By now you've probably heard about the "new DNC" -- and I'd like to make one thing clear: This is more than a branding exercise. It is a completely new organizing principle -- one designed to win elections -- that was launched by Tom Perez and Keith Ellison when they were elected to lead the DNC last year.

Our organization is quickly changing. We no longer live cycle-to-cycle, and there's no such thing as an "off year." For too long, the DNC has been largely focused on being involved in elections only every four years.

But the reality is that there is a chance to win an election almost every Tuesday from now through November -- whether it is a local school board contest, a city supervisor or mayor's race, a state legislature or governor's campaign, or a special election to fill an open seat in Congress. There are elections in every ZIP code and at all levels, and Democrats are competing everywhere, every year.

Basically, **"If it's Tuesday, it's Election Day."**

At the new DNC, we are targeting races and organizing communities in literally hundreds of municipalities, counties, and states across the country. And the key word here is "organizing." It is not a coincidence that my title is Political and Organizing Director, or that we are looking for staff with organizing backgrounds, or that we are currently hiring dozens of experienced organizers.

As we look to become more engaged locally, we're identifying individuals who can organize communities -- people who know how to knock on doors and make phone calls -- to create a stronger and more permanent infrastructure. Our commitment is to find people who are already plugged in at the local level, who will listen to local concerns, and who will foster long-term authentic relationships. We will then work with and through them to organize in those communities.

In order to implement this plan, we've come up with the following four-program approach to transform the Democratic Party state by state.

### EVERY ZIP CODE COUNTS
We are organizing and competing everywhere to win elections in 2018, 2019, and beyond -- 365 days a year. Our plan is an "Every ZIP Code Counts" strategy. To do that, we are engaging and supporting state parties -- providing them with additional resources to help them grow and to make sure they have the ability to hire experienced and talented staff.

Starting in October 2017 and through the Every ZIP Code Counts program, the DNC increased its monthly investment to $10,000 to every state party in the nation. This is a 33% increase over the base funding levels from 2016 and a 100% increase over 2015.

Recognizing that not all states are the same -- what Alabama needs may be quite different from what Arizona or Alaska needs -- my team has been on the ground in every state doing an analysis of each state party to determine what each state needs to win elections. We've met with party staff, partner organizations, and key allies to get a comprehensive understanding. And we're reviewing with the state parties what is currently working and what could be working better to help win local, statewide, and national elections.

We are partnering with our state parties to help create state-specific work plans with metrics, and we are making sure that states use their funding to strengthen their infrastructure and their overall effectiveness. The strategic plans include recommendations like hiring a communications director or requirements like voter file audits or cybersecurity precautions. They also include programmatic recommendations, such as strengthening candidate recruitment efforts or building community engagement capabilities.

In addition, we have launched a new program called the State Party Innovation Fund -- the first of its kind -- where competitive grants are awarded to state parties who put forth innovative ideas for engaging voters. These grants incentivize early organizing and supports efforts to engage African American, Latino, Asian American and Pacific Islander, millennial, and rural communities from now until Election Day.

### WINNING WITH PARTNERS
The DNC knows we can't win elections by doing all this work alone. Our party is part of a larger, multi-issue, progressive movement where we each have a role to play, and there are a number of organizations out there with different strengths and focuses. So, our greatest value-add as a partner is the role of convener.

To advance this strategy, DNC Deputy Chair Keith Ellison launched the Winning With Partners in 2018 program and has held a series of on-the-ground town hall meetings in states across the country. We are working with the newer groups, as well as working with traditional Democratic organizations that have been part of our progressive coalition for decades. Keith has already been to more than a dozen states and he has several more lined up this spring.

By pulling together state party leaders, community activists, and organizations new and old -- and listening to those grassroots leaders -- we discover common goals and agendas. Through this program, we are learning to share our resources to help one another win elections.

Winning With Partners in 2018 is part of our community engagement initiative and it is an example of the relationship building that is a priority of the new DNC. The idea is to really listen to community leaders and activists so that we are a partner in helping mobilize them before the November 2018 elections.

### THE IWILLVOTE CAMPAIGN
The DNC is committed to making every voice heard because we know when we get more people to vote, Democrats win! That's why we recently launched IWillVote.

We have an ambitious plan to reach 50 million Americans between now and Election Day to encourage them to vote for Democrats in 2018. The four components of this program will be: 1) getting our community to commit to vote, 2) ensuring they are registered to vote, 3) providing voter education and protection, and 4) running a get out the vote campaign.

Over the next six months, we hope that people across the country will visit IWillVote.com to learn how to register to vote, find out where their polling place is, and gather all the logistical information they need for Election Day. We will also be on the ground talking to voters throughout the year.

### BEST PRACTICES INSTITUTE
The new DNC will be a hub for learning and innovation where we creatively employ new technology, best practices, centralized training, and toolkits for state parties and individual candidates to use in every election.

We're not looking for cookie-cutter approaches, and we know each state is different. But sharing useful information and providing universal learnings can help all states to grow their base of support and become more effective.

The DNC is helping state parties and candidates with these trainings -- such as how to use digital tools for both fundraising and the development of stronger communities. Or which doors to knock on and which issues are motivating community activists. And increasingly, how local issues -- conversations about improving schools and personal safety -- can be just as compelling as the national issues we hear about every day.

Through the Best Practices Institute, we are investing in innovative solutions while focusing on the proven best practices that will help develop a permanent infrastructure that we will need to continue our progress in 2019, 2020, and beyond.

### MOVING FORWARD
Time is critical. With fewer than six months until the November midterm elections, we have a lot of work to do. Our success will come through the four programs outlined above: 1) Every ZIP Code Counts; 2) Winning With Partners in 2018; 3) the IWillVote campaign; and 4) the Best Practices Institute.

Thank you for your ongoing commitment to the Democratic Party. With your continued support, I am confident the DNC will help Democrats win up and down the ticket, reverse the dangerous policies of the Trump administration, and fight for the principles and values of our party.

All my best,

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

body:
Peter,
I sent an email recently talking about how when I entered this race, I was told we’d need to raise at least $2 million to beat Steve King—$500,000 before the primary and $1.5 million after that.
**$2 million is an obscene amount of money to raise to win an election, especially when you’re as passionate about getting big money out of politics as I am.** But when you’re running against an eight-term incumbent like Steve King who is supported by corporate PACs, it’s going to take tremendous resources to get the job done.
This total still seems daunting to me, but I’m absolutely thrilled to say that **we’re only $1,844 away from our primary goal of $500,000,** and we’ve done it the _right way_ , with grassroots support from over 6,000 individual donors and zero money from corporate PACs! Our final pre-primary deadline is just a few hours away (midnight tonight). [**_Help us keep the pressure on Steve King with a donation of whatever you can!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1226519/6768612/1125094398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGMwNTU5ZS03NjU5LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRhNzgwMTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0YCqwlpVoESFJMYp-ZWEHmJVLsyCPP4o-0-yEsaBEw=)
I also want to take a moment to say **THANK YOU.**
Your support—from financial contributions, to volunteering, to advice, to sharing posts on social media, to words of encouragement—has meant the world to me. This campaign wouldn’t be where it is today without the help of thousands of people coming together for change. **This is what a grassroots movement is all about.** So I hate to ask one more time, but I’m hoping you can click that donate button below and [**_help me to blow this final goal away before midnight tonight._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1226520/6768613/1125094398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGMwNTU5ZS03NjU5LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRhNzgwMTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0YCqwlpVoESFJMYp-ZWEHmJVLsyCPP4o-0-yEsaBEw=) Thank you!
Standing Tall for All
J.D. Scholten

So I hate to ask one more time, but I’m hoping you can click that donate button below and = Thank you! Standing Tall for All J.D. subject: The bigger picture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:

| | Much of my life has revolved around politics. These days, it's easier than ever to get caught up in the day-to-day of it all, watching the news cycle bounce from one story to the next without stopping to look at the bigger picture. But Peter -- _we have to keep that bigger picture in mind._ We can yell at our TVs all we want, but the progress we're fighting for in this election isn't just about what's going on every day in Washington, D.C. It's about looking out for our fellow Americans, helping struggling families, and making sure hardworking people -- in Ohio and nationwide -- have the resources they need to succeed. **That 's why it's absolutely critical that we're supporting leaders like Sherrod Brown, who are willing to work hard every single day to level the playing field.** [**_Sherrod is facing a tough re-election, and he needs our support. name: FL Race Alert
subject: New Poll: Andrew Gillum gaining ground
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b3/9e00690/473c593c/24021a06/3270289222/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-poll?gpsid=13_55_596&refcode=em18_180516_MayPol_fnd_gq_act_nograph__TG&utm_campaign=em18_180516_MayPol_fnd_gq_act_nograph__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil")
Great news, friends,

Polls are showing that with a little more than 100 days until Primary Day, Andrew Gillum is currently tied for second place -- and when voters learn about all the candidates for Governor, Andrew Gillum soars to a _double-digit lead_.

We've spent the last 14 months educating voters about Andrew's roots in the state and his background as the son of a construction worker and a bus driver -- and his bold, progressive agenda to invest more than $1 billion in our public schools and students, give teachers and support staff the raise they deserve, and make quality health care a constitutional right for all Floridians. And our work is paying off.

Andrew is poised to win this wide-open primary, but we need your help to keep up the momentum. We won't be able to match the resources of our three opponents -- but this polling proves that we don't have to -- as long as we communicate to primary voters, we will win.

**[Can you help us reach our mid-month goal of $5,675 by Saturday at midnight to stay on track this month? Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b3/9e00690/473c593c/24021a06/3270289222/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-poll?gpsid=13_55_596&refcode=em18_180516_MayPol_fnd_gq_act_nograph__TG&utm_campaign=em18_180516_MayPol_fnd_gq_act_nograph__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil")**

We're up against a lot in the final stretch to the primary, but the polls show we can bring in a victory -- and we need to know you're with us.

This November, the people of Florida have the chance to take back the Governor's mansion, and that's only going to happen if we have a progressive champion leading our state forward.

**[So please, chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, and help Andrew keep fighting.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b3/9e00690/473c593c/24021a06/3270289222/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-poll?gpsid=13_55_596&refcode=em18_180516_MayPol_fnd_gq_act_nograph__TG&utm_campaign=em18_180516_MayPol_fnd_gq_act_nograph__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil")**

name: staff@joeforindiana.com
subject: *Another* dark money group is attacking Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Karl Rove's dark money group is on the air attacking Joe! |
---

| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2124/7377f838/3f72a30e/51f96524/3202093424/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-may2018mm?refcode=20180516.2nd&amount=10")
---

Time is running out to hit our mid-month goal, Peter. **And just now, another dark money group has gone on the air attacking Joe --** this one tied to Karl Rove, one of the first users of the dark arts of dark money. We need you to help us hit our goal before midnight tonight so we can fight back against this ad before it's too late.

Let's take a second to see what we're up against:
* We're facing off against an opponent who's already poured in _$6 million of his own money_ to win his primary campaign.
* Billionaire extremist donors like the Koch brothers have already pumped in _$8 million_ to attack Joe.
* President Trump and VP Pence are out on the trail campaigning against Joe. VP Pence is even coming back AGAIN Friday to raise money for Joe's opponent.

**And now, we have another out-of-state, dark money group up on TV to distort Joe 's record.**

But we will fight back.

**To win this race, we 're going to have to build the strongest grassroots campaign in Indiana history to talk to every voter about why we need Joe's independent voice in the Senate to protect health care, Social Security, and middle-class jobs in Indiana -- but we know we can do it.**

This is the last email we'll send asking for money today. Our mid-month deadline is tonight at midnight. **Will you contribute now to help us meet our goal?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2124/7377f838/3f72a30e/51f96520/3202093424/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-may2018mm?express_lane=true&refcode=20180516.2nd&amount=100")**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2124/7377f838/3f72a30e/51f96523/3202093424/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-may2018mm?refcode=20180516.2nd")****
Thanks for all you do,
Team Donnelly

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Joe Donnelly**
Subject: I'll be brief, team
To: Staff

Team, we're at a turning point in this race. Mitch McConnell, the Washington special interests -- they all have a candidate to line up behind now and try to beat me. If that wasn't enough, he's one who was willing to prime the pump of special interest funding by spending millions of dollars of his own.

But while we're at a turning point, that's certainly not an ending point -- far from it. In 2012, we beat the cynics by going door to door in every Indiana community with a positive vision for how to move our country forward. We can do it again this year. No matter how much they spend to try and take me down, I won't stop working to stand up for Hoosiers.

But we have to stay on track, and to do that we have to hit our mid-month goal. Kelly tells me we're still 137 supporters short.

I know we ask for a lot, and I want to thank you for everything you've done so far. But the attacks keep coming, so I have to ask you again: Can you make a donation at this special link before tonight's deadline? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-may2018mm](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2124/7377f838/3f72a30e/51f96524/3202093424/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-may2018mm?refcode=20180516.2nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Joe
